name: Veal Normande
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup peeled and sliced tart apple
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter with oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the veal and brown, turning once.
3. Transfer the veal to a platter.
4. Add brandy and shallots to the skillet and stir, scraping up any browned bits clinging to the bottom of the pan.
5. Blend in the soup and milk.
6. Return the veal to the pan with apple.
7. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring once or twice, until heated through.
8. Serve over rice.
